features: ❤️ Romantic Heart Design – Timeless heart shape symbolizes love and affection, ideal for Valentine’s Day, anniversaries, weddings or special romantic surprises.
🎀 Satin Ribbon Finish – Adorned with luxurious satin bows for a chic and sophisticated look that instantly elevates your gift presentation.
💖 Multi-Purpose Gift Packaging – Perfect for chocolates, jewelry, perfume, cosmetics or keepsakes. Ideal for romantic gifting, birthdays and bridal showers.
🌹 Rigid and Reusable Quality – Made from sturdy cardboard with a matte finish and gold trim; reusable for multiple occasions without losing shape or color.
📏 Dimensions – 16 x 14 x 6 cm (6.30 x 5.51 x 2.36 in).
description: Product Description Elegant Heart-Shaped Red Gift Box - 16 x 14 x 6 cm Express love with style! These luxury heart box with satin ribbon are perfect for romantic gifts, Valentine’s Day surprises, weddings, or birthdays. Beautifully crafted for an unforgettable presentation. Elegant Heart Design These red heart-shaped boxes with satin ribbon bring charm and sophistication to any gift. Perfect for Valentine’s, weddings, or birthdays. Premium Craftsmanship Crafted from high-quality rigid cardboard with a smooth matte finish & silky satin bow. Sturdy & stylish, designed to elevate your gifting experience. Perfect Single Box Ideal for presenting chocolates, jewellery, candles, or love notes — a single elegant box that makes every gift feel truly special. Perfect for Every Occasion Ideal for chocolates, jewellery, candles, cosmetics, or keepsakes. Adds a touch of romance to every celebration — from proposals to anniversaries.
